sentences.awadhi: प्रणाम
sentences.roman: Pranaam
sentences.english: Greetings / Salutation

sentences.awadhi: कइसे अहा?
sentences.roman: Kaise aha?
sentences.english: How are you?

sentences.awadhi: हम ठीक अही।
sentences.roman: Hum theek ahi.
sentences.english: I am fine.

sentences.awadhi: तोहार नाम का अहय?
sentences.roman: Tohar naam ka ahay?
sentences.english: What is your name?

sentences.awadhi: हम राधा अही।
sentences.roman: Hum Radha ahi.
sentences.english: I am Radha.

sentences.awadhi: हम हियाँ तुहका देखय आवा रहिन।
sentences.roman: Hum hiyaan tuhka dekhay aava rahin.
sentences.english: I came here to see you.

sentences.awadhi: कृपया जा।
sentences.roman: Kripaya ja.
sentences.english: Please go.

sentences.awadhi: चला जा।
sentences.roman: Chala ja.
sentences.english: Let's go.

sentences.roman: Haan
sentences.english: Yes

sentences.awadhi: नाहीं
sentences.roman: Naahin
sentences.english: No

sentences.awadhi: धन्यवाद
sentences.roman: Dhanyavaad
sentences.english: Thank you

sentences.awadhi: वे हमका आशीर्वाद देहें।
sentences.roman: Ve humka aashirvaad dehen.
sentences.english: They blessed me.

sentences.awadhi: हम अही, सब ठीक बा।
sentences.roman: Hum ahi, sab theek baa.
sentences.english: I am here, everything is fine.

sentences.awadhi: हम जाबय जब अम्मा आय जइहैं।
sentences.roman: Hum jaabay jab amma aay jaihain.
sentences.english: I will go when mother comes.

sentences.awadhi: लरिका कय नामकरन वोहकय महतारी-बाप ,मामा-मौसी ,आदि लोग करा थी ।
sentences.roman: Larika kay naamkaran vohakai mahtari-baap, mama-mausi, aadi log kara thi.
sentences.english: The child's naming was done by his mother, father, maternal uncle and aunt.

sentences.awadhi: बिआह के रसम कय व्यवस्था अउर खर्चा लडकी के माँ-बाप उठावा थीं ।
sentences.roman: Biaah ke rasm kay vyavastha aur kharcha ladki ke maa-baap uthaava thin.
sentences.english: The arrangements and expenses of the wedding were borne by the bride's parents.

sentences.awadhi: हमार बाबू खेत जात अहैं।
sentences.roman: Hamaar babu khet jaat ahain.
sentences.english: My father goes to the field.

sentences.awadhi: बाबू हमका बहुत प्यार करत अहैं।
sentences.roman: Babu hamka bahut pyaar karat ahain.
sentences.english: Father loves me very much.

sentences.awadhi: अम्मा घर मा बैठी अहैं।
sentences.roman: Amma ghar ma baithi ahain.
sentences.english: Mother is sitting in the house.

sentences.awadhi: घर मा सब लोग सुखी अहैं।
sentences.roman: Ghar ma sab log sukhi ahain.
sentences.english: Everyone in the house is happy.

sentences.awadhi: हम अउर हमाय भाय साथ मा खेलब।
sentences.roman: Hum aur humay bhaay saath ma khelab.
sentences.english: I and my brother will play together.

sentences.awadhi: हमरे दोस्त कय बहिन बिमार बाटय।
sentences.roman: Hamare dost kay bahin bimaar baatay.
sentences.english: My friend's sister is sick.

sentences.awadhi: हमार बहिन भी हमार विश्वास नही किहिस।
sentences.roman: Hamaar bahin bhi hamaar vishvaas nahi kihis.
sentences.english: Even my sister did not trust me.

sentences.awadhi: नामकरन के रसम मा मामा,नाना-नानी ,बुआ-फ़ुफ़ा,चाची मौसी ,दादी ,नानी सब लॊग नामकरन के रसम मा जा थीं आवा थी ।
sentences.roman: Naamkaran ke rasm ma mama, nana-naani, bua-fufa, chaachi, mausi, daadi, naani sab log aava thin.
sentences.english: For the naming ceremony, the maternal uncle, grandparents, aunts, and grandmother all came.

sentences.awadhi: बिआह के रसम मा घर के रिश्तेदार गाँव वाले बुआ ,काका ,फ़ुफ़ा,मामा,मौसी आदि लोग न्योता जा थीं ।
sentences.roman: Biaah ke rasm ma ghar ke rishtedar, gaav vale bua, kaaka, fufa, mama, mausi aadi log nyota ja thin.
sentences.english: Family members, villagers, aunts, uncles were all invited to the wedding.

sentences.awadhi: वे रोज स्कूल जा थें।
sentences.roman: Ve roz skool ja then.
sentences.english: They used to go to school daily.

sentences.awadhi: राधा रमेश के साथे शहर गयी।
sentences.roman: Radha Ramesh ke saathe sheher gayi.
sentences.english: Radha went to the city with Ramesh.

sentences.awadhi: खराब मौसम की वजह से हम सब गाँव नही जाय पाइन।
sentences.roman: Kharaab mausam ki vajah se hum sab gaav nahi jaay paain.
sentences.english: Due to bad weather we all could not go to the village.

sentences.awadhi: राजू घर छोड देहें।
sentences.roman: Raju ghar chhod dehen.
sentences.english: Raju left home.

sentences.awadhi: वे कपडा धोवत रही।
sentences.roman: Ve kapda dhovat rahi.
sentences.english: She was washing clothes.

sentences.awadhi: खाये के बाद सोया।
sentences.roman: Khaaye ke baad soya.
sentences.english: He slept after eating.

sentences.awadhi: हम लडके से झाडू से कमरा साफ़ करवाइन।
sentences.roman: Hum ladke se jhaadu se kamra saaf karvaain.
sentences.english: I got the room cleaned by the boy with a broom.

sentences.awadhi: वे सोवत्त बाटें।
sentences.roman: Ve sovatt baaten.
sentences.english: They are sleeping.

sentences.awadhi: हम तुहका देखत अही।
sentences.roman: Hum tuhka dekhat ahi.
sentences.english: I am watching you.

sentences.awadhi: तू कहाँ जात अहा? कइसा रहा?
sentences.roman: Tu kahaan jaat aha? Kaisaa raha?
sentences.english: Where are you going? How was it?

sentences.awadhi: हम कल स्कूले ना अउबय।
sentences.roman: Hum kal skoole na aubay.
sentences.english: I will not come to school tomorrow.

sentences.awadhi: वे हर दिन फ़ुटबाल खेला थें।
sentences.roman: Ve har din football khela then.
sentences.english: They used to play football every day.

sentences.awadhi: वे कल कुछु भी नही खाये रहें।
sentences.roman: Ve kal kucchu bhi nahi khaaye rahen.
sentences.english: They did not eat anything yesterday.

sentences.awadhi: वे अब मैदान जात अहय।
sentences.roman: Ve ab maidan jaat ahay.
sentences.english: They are going to the field now.

sentences.awadhi: काल्ह हम बजार जाब।
sentences.roman: Kaalh hum bajaar jaab.
sentences.english: Tomorrow I will go to the market.

sentences.awadhi: काल्ह वे हियाँ आये रहें।
sentences.roman: Kaalh ve hiyaan aaye rahen.
sentences.english: Yesterday they came here.

sentences.awadhi: हम सिर्फ़ भात खाई थे।
sentences.roman: Hum sirf bhaat khaai the.
sentences.english: I only ate rice.

sentences.awadhi: तु खुद से भात बनाये अहा।
sentences.roman: Tu khud se bhaat banaaye aha.
sentences.english: You yourself had cooked rice.

sentences.awadhi: भोज मा पूडी -सब्जी,हलुआ ,दही खीर आदि भोज लगता है ।
sentences.roman: Bhoj ma poori-sabzi, halwa, dahi, kheer aadi bhoj lagata hai.
sentences.english: In the feast, puri-sabzi, halwa, yogurt, and kheer are served.

sentences.awadhi: हमका एक दर्जन केला दिया।
sentences.roman: Humka ek darjan kela diya.
sentences.english: Give me a dozen bananas.

sentences.awadhi: वे दुध-वुध खरीदिहैं।
sentences.roman: Ve doodh-voodh kharidihain.
sentences.english: They will buy milk and such things.

sentences.awadhi: वे उनका किताब दे थें।
sentences.roman: Ve unka kitaab de then.
sentences.english: They used to give them books.

sentences.awadhi: भोज मा पुडी-सब्जी खीर मिठाई ,लडडू आदि खाना बनत है ।
sentences.roman: Bhoj ma poori-sabzi, kheer, mithai, laddoo aadi khaana banat hai.
sentences.english: In the feast, puri-sabzi, kheer, sweets, and laddoos are cooked.

sentences.awadhi: बिआह के पहिलेव भोज होत है।
sentences.roman: Biaah ke pahilev bhoj hot hai.
sentences.english: There is a feast even before the wedding.

sentences.awadhi: जादातर जनम कय रसम अउर नामकरन कय रसम कौने कौने समय पय होत है।
sentences.roman: Jaadatar janam kay rasm aur naamkaran kay rasm kaunay kaunay samay pay hot hai.
sentences.english: The birth and naming ceremonies happen at auspicious times.

sentences.awadhi: जनम अउर नामकरन कय रसन पंडित द्वारा शुभ दिन अउर तिथि देख के निश्चित कीन जात है ।
sentences.roman: Janam aur naamkaran kay rasan pandit dvaara shubh din aur tithi dekh ke nishchit keen jaat hai.
sentences.english: The birth and naming ceremony is fixed by the priest after checking an auspicious day and date.

sentences.awadhi: जनम अउर नामकरन के रसम मा फ़ूल-फ़ल ,केला ,पूडी,सब्जी सब लागत है ।
sentences.roman: Janam aur naamkaran ke rasm ma phool-phal, kela, poori, sabzi sab laagat hai.
sentences.english: Flowers, fruits, bananas, puri, and vegetables are all used in the birth and naming ceremony.

sentences.awadhi: हमरे समाज मा शादी से सम्बन्धित रसम लगन,तिलक ,विवाह होत है ।
sentences.roman: Hamare samaaj ma shaadi se sambandhit rasm lagan, tilak, vivaah hot hai.
sentences.english: In our society, wedding-related rituals include engagement, tilak, and marriage.

sentences.awadhi: बिआह के रसम मुख्यत: सिन्दूर दान ,सात फ़ेरा आदि हुअत है ।
sentences.roman: Biaah ke rasm mukhyatah sindoor daan, saat fera aadi huat hai.
sentences.english: The main wedding rituals are sindoor ceremony and the seven sacred rounds.

sentences.awadhi: बिआह के रसम का पंडित करवावा थीं अउर लडका अउर लडकी के माँ-बाप मिल के करा थीं ।
sentences.roman: Biaah ke rasm ka pandit karvaava thin aur ladka aur ladki ke maa-baap mil ke kara thin.
sentences.english: The wedding rituals were performed by the priest and the parents of the couple together.

sentences.awadhi: हमरे समाज मा मित्यु से सम्बन्धित रसम तेरहवीं अउर वरषी हुआ थै।
sentences.roman: Hamare samaaj ma mityu se sambandhit rasm terhaveen aur varshi hua thai.
sentences.english: In our society, the death-related rituals are the 13th-day ceremony and the annual memorial.

sentences.awadhi: समान्यत: म्रित्यु कय रसम म्रित्यु वाले आदमी के घरे पय हुआ थै।
sentences.roman: Samaanyatah mrityu kay rasm mrityu vale aadmi ke ghare pay hua thai.
sentences.english: Generally, the death rituals take place at the home of the deceased.

sentences.awadhi: हम जाबय जब अम्मा आय जइहैं।
sentences.roman: Hum jaabay jab amma aay jaihain.
sentences.english: I will go when mother arrives.

sentences.awadhi: अगर वे कल आवा होतें तौ हम मना कय सकत रहिन।
sentences.roman: Agar ve kal aava hoten tau hum mana kay sakat rahin.
sentences.english: If they had come yesterday, I could have refused.

sentences.awadhi: हम चाही थे की तू एक अच्छा इन्सान बना।
sentences.roman: Hum chaahi the ki tu ek achchha insaan bana.
sentences.english: I wanted you to become a good person.

sentences.awadhi: जहाँ-तहाँ किताब बिखरी पडी बाटय।
sentences.roman: Jahaan-tahaan kitaab bikhari padi baatay.
sentences.english: Books are scattered here and there.

sentences.awadhi: भूख से हमार अंतरी ककुरात अहय।
sentences.roman: Bhookh se hamaar antari kakuraat ahay.
sentences.english: Our stomach is growling with hunger.

sentences.awadhi: गाँव कय ई सबसे पुरान पेड आय।
sentences.roman: Gaav kay ee sabse puraan ped aay.
sentences.english: This is the oldest tree in the village.

sentences.awadhi: वे बिना केहू का बतायेन चला गये।
sentences.roman: Ve bina kehu ka bataayen chala gaye.
sentences.english: They left without telling anyone.

sentences.awadhi: ई बाँस कय रस्सी आय।
sentences.roman: Ee baans kay rassi aay.
sentences.english: This is a bamboo rope.

sentences.awadhi: हमरे घरे मा ढेर पेड अहय।
sentences.roman: Hamare ghare ma dher ped ahay.
sentences.english: There are many trees at our home.

sentences.awadhi: वे हमका फ़ोन केहें।
sentences.roman: Ve humka phone kehen.
sentences.english: They called me on the phone.

sentences.awadhi: राधा अपने खातिर एक साडी खरीदी।
sentences.roman: Radha apne khaatir ek saadi kharidi.
sentences.english: Radha bought a saree for herself.
